title: Plan-and-Solve Prompting: Improving Zero-Shot Chain-of-Thought Reasoning by Large Language Models

defines.name: Plan-and-Solve (PS) Prompting
defines.definition: A zero-shot prompting strategy that first asks the model to devise a plan to break a problem into subtasks and then solve the subtasks according to that plan.

defines.name: PS+ Prompting
defines.definition: An extended Plan-and-Solve prompting strategy that adds more detailed instructions to improve reasoning quality and reduce calculation errors.

problem: Zero-shot-CoT still produces calculation errors, missing-step errors, and semantic misunderstanding errors on multi-step reasoning tasks.
